root_cause_hypothesis: FUSE set_lkw polls set_lock in a loop without tracking waiters or detecting circular POSIX lock waits, so fcntl17 deadlock scenarios block until alarm expiry instead of returning EDEADLK.
planned_changes: Add a per-mount PlockWaitRegistry tracking F_SETLKW waiters and their blockers.
Before sleeping in set_lkw, register the waiter and return EDEADLK when a wait cycle is detected.
not_goals: Do not change server-side LockMeta conflict rules or unrelated FUSE ops.
Do not modify harness runner configuration.

risk.rationale: Adds wait tracking only on the blocking SETLKW path; successful lock acquisition and non-blocking SETLK paths are unchanged.
